what_it_does: This file is a ledger-style metadata record for an image asset named p-09 in the design-source pitch-deck channel; it stores identity, addressing, blob reference, MIME type, provenance, and creation timestamp, plus a one-line body label.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id pitch-deck/p-09 and image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-09 address
channel is design-source and path is pitch-deck/p-09
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
body line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — pitch-deck/p-09.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image/jpeg record

Blob-addressed asset with no links to other ledger entries
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Follows the ledger address scheme image://<channel>/<path>
Records provenance with source, author_session, and ISO 8601 timestamp
concerns: Zero width/height suggests missing image dimension extraction
Empty links array leaves the asset isolated in the ledger
No descriptive text, alt text, or content summary for the image
notes: A minimal metadata stub that registers a pitch-deck image as a design-source ground-truth asset but currently lacks dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0?

purpose_vs_actual: The body declares it as a SOURCE design ground-truth image, which matches the channel and id, but the record currently carries only identity/provenance fields and placeholder dimensions rather than a fully populated asset description.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a specific pitch-deck image as a canonical, traceable design-source artifact in the channel-memory ledger.
novelty: The record explicitly labels the image as a SOURCE design ground-truth and stores a blob pointer, yet records zero dimensions for a JPEG asset.
contribution: Provides a stable identity, channel membership, blob pointer, and creation provenance for image p-09, which a fused system could retain as an authoritative asset locator and audit record.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory metadata record for a JPEG image asset named p-09 in the design-source pitch-deck channel, referencing a blob and recording creation provenance but with zero width and height and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a pitch-deck image as a design ground-truth source in the ledger.
